title: Crafts 4 ALL Acrylic Paint Set - 12 Paints for Canvas, Wood, Ceramic, Fabric - Non Toxic, Vibrant Pigments for Beginners, Adults and Professional Artists - Art Supplies
features: Our acrylic paints set is uniquely crafted to bring out maximum brilliance and colour clarity with a rich viscosity that makes mixing easy.
These versatile acrylic paints for artists are suitable for most mediums - canvas, wood, glass, ceramic, paper, and more! Forget abstract, these paints make an impression!
Formulated with a non-toxic composition, these acrylic paint sets for adults produce vivid, long-lasting colours that dry fast.
Our art supplies for artists have a premium consistency, perfect for blending, layering, and creating texture, while producing a wide spectrum of shades and hues.
Perfect Gift: The perfect gift for women and men that will bring a smile to their face. We know it's hard finding gifts for women and men in your lives, but look no further than Crafts 4 All!
description: Product Description NON-TOXIC AND SAFE FOR YOU Our 12 pc. Acrylic paint set is safe and non-toxic. It is water-based making it easy to clean; no need to purchase any specialized or toxic cleaning chemicals. A FULL PALETTE OF COLORS A wide range of vivid & vibrant colors is available in our 12 pc. acrylic paint set. These eye-catching pigments will help inspire you to continue bringing your artistic ideas to life. It includes all the essential colors as well as some special additions to help you add a pop of color to any artwork. DESIGNED FOR YOU Works with many painting surfaces, from the standard paper or canvas to the unexpected like fabric, plaster, or glass. It is perfect for beginners and seasoned professionals. Use each paint straight from the tube or mix and blend together to create new shades and hues for your artwork!
